prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 anime-style illustration of a gentle young woman standing centered in front of a charming small clothing shop. She has very long dark brown hair, warm brown eyes, fair skin, a soft shy smile, and a graceful front-facing pose with both gloved hands clasped at her waist. Dress her in an elaborate cream and blush pink princess lolita gown: off-shoulder puff sleeves, lace-trimmed neckline, floral choker, fitted lace-up corset bodice, white gloves with lace cuffs, a voluminous layered skirt, ornate cream lace panels, embroidered pink roses near the hem, and exactly 5 prominent pink bows: 1 at the chest, 2 on the sleeves, 1 on the left skirt side, and 1 on the right skirt side. The setting is a sunny European cottage storefront with warm hand-painted textures: a wooden sign above the awning reading SHOP, an orange-and-cream striped scalloped awning, green-framed windows and a green door, and a small hanging sign on the door reading OPEN. Include exactly 2 readable signs total: the large shop sign and the door sign. Add cozy details around her: a terracotta pot of white daisies on the left, a small blank chalkboard leaning near the entrance, leafy vines climbing on the right wall, and a colorful flower bed on the right. Use soft golden daylight, delicate line art, pastel colors, romantic shoujo anime atmosphere, rich lace detail, painterly background, and a wholesome boutique fashion theme. Keep the character full-body or nearly full-body, centered, with the skirt filling the lower half of the image; avoid modern logos, extra text, watermarks, or additional characters.
